---
title: "missing-data"
output: html_document
date: "2026-07-15"
---

# Data cleaning + imputation

## Data preparation

```{r loading-libraries, message = false}
library(tidyverse)
library(sf)
library(dplyr)
library(visdat)
library(naniar)
library(gtsummary)
library(gt)
library(mice)
library(flextable)
library(officer)
library(gtsummary)
library(kableExtra)
```

```{r reading-data}
data <- readRDS("data/analysis_dataset.rds")
```

```{r harmonizing-mvpa}
data <- data %>%
  mutate(
    modpa_days = if_else(modpa_days < 0, NA_real_, modpa_days),
    modpa_freq = if_else(modpa_freq < 0, NA_real_, modpa_freq),
    vigpa_days = if_else(vigpa_days < 0, NA_real_, vigpa_days),
    vigpa_freq = if_else(vigpa_freq < 0, NA_real_, vigpa_freq)
  )

data <- data %>%
  mutate(
    modpa_min_week = case_when(
      modpa == 2 ~ 0,  
      modpa == 1 & !is.na(modpa_days) & !is.na(modpa_freq) ~ modpa_days * modpa_freq,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_ # if missing -> NA, if 0 -> 0. 
    ),
    vigpa_min_week = case_when(
      vigpa == 2 ~ 0,
      vigpa == 1 & !is.na(vigpa_days) & !is.na(vigpa_freq) ~ vigpa_days * vigpa_freq,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    mvpa_computed = modpa_min_week + vigpa_min_week
  )

 data <- data %>%
   mutate(
     mvpa_harmonized = case_when(
       !is.na(mvpa) ~ mvpa,                    
       is.na(mvpa) & !is.na(mvpa_computed) ~ mvpa_computed,
       TRUE ~ NA_real_
     )
   )
```

```{r recoding-ethnicity}
data <- data %>%
  mutate(
    ethnicity_r = case_when(
      ethnicity == "African origins" ~ 1,
      ethnicity == "Asian origins" ~ 2,
      ethnicity == "European origins" ~ 3,
      ethnicity == "Latin, Central and South American origins" ~ 4,
      ethnicity == "North American origins" ~ 5,
      ethnicity == "Other ethnic and cultural origins" ~ 6))

table(data$ethnicity, data$ethnicity_r)
```

```{r saving-geometry}
# saving geometry to re-attach it after imputation

geom_df <- data %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  mutate(
    wave = factor(wave),
    geometry = st_geometry(data)) %>% 
  select(interact_id, wave, geometry, 
         public_transit) # won't be imputed but will be added later
       
crs_orig <- st_crs(data)
```

```{r creating-data-sample}
data_sample <- data %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%            
  mutate(
    city_id      = factor(city_id),
    wave         = factor(wave),
    gender       = factor(gender),
    ethnicity_r  = factor(ethnicity_r),
    employment   = factor(employment),
    income       = factor(income),
    education    = factor(education),
    travel_walk  = factor(travel_walk),
    travel_bike  = factor(travel_bike),
    travel_motor = factor(travel_motor)
  ) %>%
  select(
    interact_id, wave, city_id,
    gender, age, ethnicity_r, employment, income, education,
    travel_walk, travel_bike, travel_motor,
    ALE_index, ALE_transit_index, z_int, z_dwel, z_poi_count, trstop_count, mvpa_harmonized
  )
```

## Examining missingness

```{r missing-proportion}
prop_miss(data_sample)
```

```{r missingness-by-variable}
analysis_vars <- c(
  "mvpa_harmonized",
  "travel_walk",
  "travel_bike",
  "ALE_index",
  "trstop_count",
  "income",
  "age",
  "gender",
  "ethnicity_r",
  "city_id",
  "wave"
)

missing_table <- data_sample %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  summarise(
    across(
      all_of(analysis_vars),
      list(
        n_missing = ~ sum(is.na(.)),
        pct_missing = ~ mean(is.na(.)) * 100
      ),
      .names = "{.col}_{.fn}"
    )
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = everything(),
    names_to = c("variable", ".value"),
    names_pattern = "(.+)_(n_missing|pct_missing)"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    pct_missing = round(pct_missing, 1),
    variable_label = recode(
      variable,
      "mvpa_harmonized" = "Moderate-to-vigorous physical activity",
      "travel_walk" = "Walking for transportation",
      "travel_bike" = "Cycling for transportation",
      "ALE_index" = "Can-ALE index",
      "trstop_count" = "Transit stop count",
      "income" = "Household income",
      "age" = "Age",
      "gender" = "Gender",
      "ethnicity_r" = "Ethnic or cultural background",
      "city_id" = "City",
      "wave" = "Wave"
    ),
    role = recode(
      variable,
      "mvpa_harmonized" = "Outcome",
      "travel_walk" = "Exposure component",
      "travel_bike" = "Exposure component",
      "ALE_index" = "Built environment measure",
      "trstop_count" = "Built environment measure",
      "income" = "Effect modifier / covariate",
      "age" = "Covariate",
      "gender" = "Covariate",
      "ethnicity_r" = "Covariate",
      "city_id" = "Covariate",
      "wave" = "Time variable"
    )
  ) %>%
  select(
    Variable = variable_label,
    Role = role,
    `Missing, n` = n_missing,
    `Missing, %` = pct_missing
  )

```

```{r exporting-table}
missing_table_flex <- flextable(missing_table) %>%
  theme_booktabs() %>%
  font(fontname = "Times New Roman", part = "all") %>%
  fontsize(size = 12, part = "all") %>%
  bold(part = "header") %>%
  align(
    j = c("Variable", "Role"),
    align = "left",
    part = "all"
  ) %>%
  align(
    j = c("Missing, n", "Missing, %"),
    align = "center",
    part = "all"
  ) %>%
  colformat_num(
    j = "Missing, %",
    digits = 1,
    na_str = "\u2014"
  ) %>%
  autofit() %>%
  set_caption(
    caption = as_paragraph(
      as_chunk(
        "Table S2. ",
        props = fp_text(
          font.family = "Times New Roman",
          font.size = 12,
          bold = TRUE
        )
      ),
      as_chunk(
        "Missingness by analysis variable before imputation",
        props = fp_text(
          font.family = "Times New Roman",
          font.size = 12,
          bold = FALSE
        )
      )
    )
  )

missing_table_flex

save_as_docx(
  missing_table_flex,
  path = "tables and figures/missing_table_flex.docx")
```

## MICE

```{r prediction-matrix}
pred <- make.predictorMatrix(data_sample)
ignore <- c("interact_id")
pred[, ignore] <- 0
```

```{r mice}
set.seed(8)
data_mice <- mice(data_sample, m = 5, maxit = 5, predictorMatrix = pred)
```

```{r completed-dataset}
data_mice_long <- complete(data_mice, action = "long")
data_mice_long$.imp <- as.factor(data_mice_long$.imp)

data_mice_c <- complete(data_mice, action = 1)

# re-attaching geometry
data_mice_sf <- data_mice_c %>%
  left_join(geom_df, by = c("interact_id", "wave")) %>%
  st_as_sf(crs = crs_orig)
```


```{r density-plots}
# age
age_plot <- ggplot() +
  geom_density(
    data = data_sample,
    aes(x = age, colour = "Original Data"),
    na.rm = TRUE
  ) +
  geom_density(
    data = data_mice_c,
    aes(x = age, colour = "MICE-imputed Data"),
    na.rm = TRUE
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Age",
    y = "Density",
    colour = "Dataset"
  )
age_plot

# ale-index
ale_plot <- ggplot() +
  geom_density(
    data = data_sample,
    aes(x = ALE_index, colour = "Original Data"),
    na.rm = TRUE
  ) +
  geom_density(
    data = data_mice_c,
    aes(x = ALE_index, colour = "MICE-imputed Data"),
    na.rm = TRUE
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "ALE Index",
    y = "Density",
    colour = "Dataset"
  )

ale_plot 
```

```{r comparing-summary-stats}
summary(data_sample)
summary(data_mice_c)
```

```{r saving-imputed-data}
saveRDS(data_mice_sf,"data/imputed_dataset.rds")
```
